title: Rhodes Scholarship
description: Full funding for 2–3 years of study at the University of Oxford. One of the oldest international scholarship programs.
eligibility: US citizen, age 18–24, bachelor's by October of award year

title: Marshall Scholarship
description: Full funding for US students to study at any UK university. Up to 50 awards annually.

title: Rotary Global Grant
description: Graduate-level funding for study abroad in one of Rotary's six focus areas. Awards vary by district.
eligibility: Contact local Rotary club; graduate study aligned with focus areas

title: Boren Fellowship
description: Funding for graduate students to study less commonly taught languages in world regions critical to US interests.
eligibility: US citizen, graduate student, study in approved country

title: Thomas R. Pickering Foreign Affairs Fellowship
description: Funded graduate program and pathway to Foreign Service. Covers tuition and includes internships.
eligibility: US citizen, seeking graduate degree, interested in Foreign Service
